modules.module_title: Introduction to Tree Plantation & Its Importance

questions.question: Ped lagane ka primary reason kya hai?

options.A: Hawa ko saaf karna

questions.explanation: Ped lagane ka sabse mahatvapurna uddeshya paryavaran ko sudharna hai, jisme hawa ko saaf karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Bharat mein Van Mahotsav kab manaya jata hai?

options.A: July ke pehle hafte mein

questions.explanation: Van Mahotsav har saal July ke pehle hafte mein ped lagane ke mahatva ko badhane ke liye manaya jata hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa ped oxygen production mein sabse zyada yogdan deta hai?

options.A: Banyan (Bargad)

questions.explanation: Banyan jaise bade aur ghane ped zyada surface area aur lambi lifespan ke karan zyada oxygen produce karte hain.

questions.question: Soil erosion ko rokne mein trees kaise help karte hain?

options.A: Apni jadon se mitti ko pakad kar

questions.explanation: Pedon ki jadein mitti ko pakad kar rakhti hain, jisse baarish aur hawa se hone wale mitti ke kataav (soil erosion) ko roka ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Arid regions mein kaun se type ke trees lagana preferable hota hai?

options.A: Kam pani mein jeene wale (drought-resistant)

questions.explanation: Arid regions mein pani ki kami hoti hai, isliye wahan aise ped lagaye jate hain jo kam pani mein survive kar sakein.

questions.question: Agroforestry ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kheti ke saath ped lagana

questions.explanation: Agroforestry ek land use management system hai jahan kheti aur pedon ko ek saath ugnaya jata hai, jisse dono ke fayde milte hain.

questions.question: Greenhouse gas emissions ko kam karne mein trees ka kya role hai?

options.A: Carbon dioxide ko absorb karna

questions.explanation: Trees photosynthesis ke process mein atmosphere se carbon dioxide ko absorb karte hain, jo ek pramukh greenhouse gas hai.

questions.question: Biodiversity ko promote karne mein trees kaise help karte hain?

options.A: Animals aur birds ke liye habitat provide karke
options.D: Ek hi type ke ped lagakar

questions.explanation: Ped animals, birds aur insects ke liye shelter aur food provide karte hain, jisse biodiversity badhti hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa tree 'sacred tree' mana jata hai Hindu mythology mein?

options.A: Peepal

questions.explanation: Peepal ka ped Hindu dharm mein bahut pavitra mana jata hai aur iski pooja ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Urban areas mein trees lagane ka ek disadvantage kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Underground utility lines ko damage karna

questions.explanation: Kuch bade pedon ki jadein underground pipes aur cables ko damage kar sakti hain, jo urban areas mein ek concern hai.

questions.question: Kis type ki plantation se windbreak banaya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Rows mein ghane ped lagana

questions.explanation: Windbreak banane ke liye pedon ko ghani rows mein lagaya jata hai, jisse tez hawaon ko roka ja sake.

questions.question: Trees ka medical importance kya hai?

options.A: Kai dawaiyon ka source hote hain

questions.explanation: Kai pedon ki pattiyan, chhal aur jaden traditional aur modern medicine mein upyog ki jaati hain.

questions.question: Kaun sa tree apni anti-bacterial properties ke liye jana jata hai?

options.A: Neem

questions.explanation: Neem ka ped apni anti-bacterial, anti-fungal aur medicinal properties ke liye widely recognized hai.

questions.question: Carbon sequestration kya hai?

options.A: Atmosphere se carbon dioxide ko absorb karna aur store karna

questions.explanation: Carbon sequestration woh process hai jahan carbon dioxide ko atmosphere se remove karke long-term storage ke liye rakha jata hai, aur ped ismein mahatvapurna bhoomika nibhate hain.

questions.question: Forests se milne wala non-timber forest product (NTFP) ka ek example kya hai?

options.A: Honey (Shahad)

questions.explanation: NTFP mein woh products aate hain jo forests se milte hain lekin lakdi nahi hote, jaise honey, medicinal plants, fruits, gums, etc.

questions.question: Ped lagane se local temperature par kya asar padta hai?

options.A: Temperature kam hota hai

questions.explanation: Ped shade provide karte hain aur transpiration ke through surrounding air ko cool karte hain, jisse local temperature kam hota hai.

questions.question: Monoculture plantation ka ek major disadvantage kya hai?

options.A: Pest aur disease ka zyada risk

questions.explanation: Monoculture mein ek hi type ke ped hone se, agar koi pest ya disease aata hai, toh woh poori plantation ko nuksan pahuncha sakta hai.

questions.question: Nursery ke liye site selection karte samay sabse important factor kya hai?

options.A: Pani ki upalabdhta (Water availability)

questions.explanation: Plants ko regular pani ki zaroorat hoti hai, isliye nursery ke liye pani ki achhi upalabdhta hona sabse mahatvapurna hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein seedlings ko ugane ke liye kis type ki soil prefer ki jaati hai?

options.A: Loamy soil

questions.explanation: Loamy soil mein pani aur hawa ka santulan achha hota hai, jo seedlings ki growth ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Seedlings ko transplant karne se pehle kis process se guzara jata hai?

options.A: Hardening off

questions.explanation: Hardening off process mein seedlings ko gradually outdoor conditions ke liye prepare kiya jata hai, jisse transplant shock kam ho.

questions.question: Nursery beds ki standard चौड़ाई (width) kitni honi chahiye?

options.A: 1-1.2 meter

questions.explanation: Nursery beds ki standard चौड़ाई itni honi chahiye ki unke dono taraf se aasani se kaam kiya ja sake, jo आमतौर पर 1 se 1.2 meter hoti hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein over-watering se kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Root rot

questions.explanation: Over-watering se mitti mein oxygen ki kami ho jaati hai, jisse jadoon mein sadan (root rot) shuru ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Shade net ka use nursery mein kyon kiya jata hai?

options.A: Tez dhoop se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Shade net seedlings ko tez dhoop aur high temperature se bachane ke liye upyog kiya jata hai, especially summer mein.

questions.question: Nursery mein soil sterilization ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Mitti ko germs, pests aur weeds se mukt karna

questions.explanation: Soil sterilization woh process hai jismein mitti ko heat ya chemicals se treat karke usmein maujood harmful pathogens, pests aur weed seeds ko hataya jata hai.

questions.question: Polybag mein plants ugane ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Transplanting mein aasani

questions.explanation: Polybag mein ugaye gaye plants ko unki roots disturb kiye bina aasani se ek jagah se doosri jagah transplant kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein tools ko clean aur maintain karna kyon important hai?

options.A: Diseases failane se rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Clean tools diseases ko ek plant se doosre plant tak failne se rokte hain aur tools ki lifespan bhi badhate hain.

questions.question: Seedlings ko nursery bed se nikalte samay kin baton ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Roots ko kam se kam disturb karna

questions.explanation: Seedlings ko nikalte samay roots ko damage hone se bachana chahiye, taki transplant shock kam ho aur survival rate badhe.

questions.question: Nursery mein potting mixture mein sand kyon use karte hain?

options.A: Drainage improve karne ke liye
options.C: Mitti ko bhari banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Sand potting mixture mein drainage ko behtar banata hai, jisse pani jama nahi hota aur root rot ka khatra kam hota hai.

questions.question: Vermi-compost ka use nursery mein kya fayda deta hai?

options.A: Soil ki fertility badhata hai

questions.explanation: Vermi-compost ek organic fertilizer hai jo mitti ki quality, structure aur nutrient content ko sudharta hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein 'pricking out' kya hai?

options.A: Small seedlings ko ek jagah se doosri jagah transplant karna

questions.explanation: Pricking out woh process hai jismein thickly sown seeds se nikle chhote seedlings ko individually transplant kiya jata hai, jisse unhein zyada space aur nutrients mil sakein.

questions.question: Nursery mein watering ke liye kaun sa method sabse efficient hai?

options.A: Drip irrigation
options.B: Hose pipe se seedha pani dena

questions.explanation: Drip irrigation pani ko seedhe plant ki roots tak pahunchata hai, jisse pani ki bachat hoti hai aur evaporation kam hota hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein soil pH level maintain karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Nutrient availability ko control karne ke liye
options.B: Mitti ko hard banane ke liye
options.C: Pani ki matra badhane ke liye
options.D: Sunshine ko block karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Soil pH level nutrients ki availability ko directly affect karta hai. Har plant type ke liye ek optimum pH range hoti hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein 'root pruning' ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.A: Roots ko compact aur fibrous banana

questions.explanation: Root pruning se roots ko trim kiya jata hai, jisse plant ke andar ek compact aur fibrous root system develop hota hai, jo transplanting ke liye behtar hota hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein plant tags ka kya use hai?

options.A: Plant ki jaati, variety aur sowing date record karne ke liye
options.B: Plants ko sundar dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Plant tags se har plant ki specific information (jaise species, variety, planting date) ko track karna आसान ho jata hai.

questions.question: Seed collection ke liye sabse achha time kab hota hai?

options.A: Jab fruits aur seeds fully mature ho jayein

questions.explanation: Seeds ko tabhi collect karna chahiye jab woh fully mature aur ripe ho jayein, tab unki germination capacity sabse achhi hoti hai.

questions.question: Seed viability kya hai?

options.A: Seed ki germinate hone ki kshamta

questions.explanation: Seed viability seed ki zinda rehne aur germinate hokar ek healthy plant banane ki kshamta ko darshati hai.

questions.question: Seed dormancy ko break karne ke liye kaun sa method use kiya jata hai?

options.A: Scarification

questions.explanation: Scarification ek process hai jismein seed coat ko mechanically ya chemically scratch ya soft kiya jata hai, taki pani andar ja sake aur germination ho.

questions.question: Vegetative propagation ka ek example kya hai?

options.A: Cuttings lagana

questions.explanation: Vegetative propagation mein plant ke vegetative parts (jaise stem, leaf, root) se naye plants ugaye jate hain, cuttings uska ek common method hai.

questions.question: Grafting mein do parts hote hain, ek stock aur doosra kya?

options.A: Scion

questions.explanation: Grafting mein, stock root system provide karta hai aur scion desired shoot system (jisse fruits ya flowers aate hain) provide karta hai.

questions.question: Layering method mein naye plant ko kaise banaya jata hai?

options.A: Parent plant se attached rehte hue root develop karake
options.D: Leaf ko pani mein rakh kar

questions.explanation: Layering mein, plant ka ek branch parent plant se attached rehte hue mitti mein dabaya jata hai, jahan woh roots develop karta hai aur phir use alag kar diya jata hai.

questions.question: Seeds ko store karte samay kis factor ka dhyan rakhna sabse zaroori hai?

options.A: Low moisture aur low temperature

questions.explanation: Seeds ko low moisture aur low temperature par store karne se unki viability lambe samay tak bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Seed germination ke liye kaun se conditions essential hain?

options.A: Pani, oxygen aur sahi temperature

questions.explanation: Seeds ko germinate hone ke liye pani (hydration), oxygen (respiration ke liye) aur ek optimum temperature range ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Tissue culture kis type ki propagation technique hai?

options.A: In-vitro vegetative propagation

questions.explanation: Tissue culture ek advanced method hai jahan plant cells, tissues ya organs ko sterile conditions mein ek nutrient medium par grow kiya jata hai, jisse bade paimane par plants banaye ja sakein.

questions.question: Hardwood cuttings kis season mein li jaati hain?

options.A: Dormant season (winter)

questions.explanation: Hardwood cuttings usually dormant season mein li jaati hain jab plant par koi patte nahi hote, aur unhein root develop karne ke liye time milta hai.

questions.question: Seed treatment ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Pests aur diseases se bachana

questions.explanation: Seed treatment mein fungicides ya insecticides se seeds ko treat kiya jata hai, jisse woh sowing ke baad pests aur diseases se surakshit rahein.

questions.question: Apomixis kya hai?

options.A: Sexual reproduction ke bina seed formation

questions.explanation: Apomixis ek prakriya hai jismein bina fertilization ke seeds ban jate hain, jisse parent plant ke exact clones produce hote hain.

questions.question: Rooting hormone ka use cuttings mein kyon karte hain?

options.A: Roots ki formation ko stimulate karne ke liye
options.B: Pattiyon ko bada karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Rooting hormone cuttings mein jadon ke vikas ko badhawa deta hai, jisse success rate badhta hai.

questions.question: Budding kis type ki propagation technique hai?

options.A: Grafting ka ek prakar

questions.explanation: Budding ek grafting technique hai jismein ek single bud ko ek stock par attach kiya jata hai, bajaye ki poore scion ke.

questions.question: Seed drill ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Seeds ko uniform depth aur spacing par boona

questions.explanation: Seed drill ek agricultural implement hai jo seeds ko mitti mein ek uniform depth aur spacing par boone mein help karta hai, jisse achhi germination hoti hai.

questions.question: Stratification kya hai?

options.A: Seeds ko cold aur moist conditions mein rakhna
options.B: Seeds ko garam pani mein bhigona
options.D: Seeds ko chemicals se treat karna

questions.explanation: Stratification ek process hai jismein seeds ko cold aur moist conditions mein rakha jata hai, taaki unki dormancy break ho aur woh germinate ho sakein.

questions.question: Air layering ke liye kis cheez ka use kiya jata hai?

options.A: Moist sphagnum moss aur plastic wrap

questions.explanation: Air layering mein, ek branch par cut lagakar use moist sphagnum moss se cover kiya jata hai aur plastic wrap se bandh diya jata hai, jisse roots develop ho sakein.

questions.question: Saplings ko watering karte samay kis baat ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Mitti ko moist rakhna, zyada gila nahi
options.B: Mitti ko poori tarah se sukha dena
options.C: Har din ek hi matra mein pani dena

questions.explanation: Saplings ko over-watering aur under-watering dono se bachana chahiye. Mitti ko consistently moist rakhna ideal hai.

questions.question: Weeding ka kya fayda hai saplings ke liye?

options.A: Nutrients aur pani ke liye competition kam karna

questions.explanation: Weeds saplings ke saath nutrients, pani aur light ke liye compete karte hain, unhein hatane se saplings ko behtar growth milti hai.

questions.question: Saplings mein fertilizers kab apply karne chahiye?

options.A: Jab plant active growth stage mein ho
options.C: Jab plant mein phool aa rahe hon
options.D: Jab plant fruit de raha ho

questions.explanation: Fertilizers ko tabhi apply karna chahiye jab plant active growth mein ho, taki woh nutrients ko effectively use kar sake.

questions.question: Damping-off disease kisko affect karti hai?

options.A: Young seedlings ko, unke stem base par

questions.explanation: Damping-off ek fungal disease hai jo young seedlings ko unke stem base par attack karti hai, jisse woh gir jate hain aur mar jate hain.

questions.question: Mulching ka kya benefit hai saplings ke liye?

options.A: Soil moisture maintain karna aur weeds ko suppress karna

questions.explanation: Mulch mitti ki nami ko banaye rakhta hai, soil temperature ko regulate karta hai aur weeds ko control karta hai.

questions.question: Saplings ko over-fertilize karne se kya nuksan ho sakta hai?

options.A: Root burn aur plant death

questions.explanation: Excessive fertilizers mitti mein salt build-up karte hain, jisse roots jal sakti hain aur plant mar sakta hai.

questions.question: Integrated Pest Management (IPM) ka kya principle hai?

options.A: Pests ko control karne ke liye multiple methods ka use karna

questions.explanation: IPM mein pests ko control karne ke liye biological, cultural, physical aur chemical methods ka combination use kiya jata hai, jisse environmental impact kam ho.

questions.question: Saplings ko sunlight ki kitni zaroorat hoti hai?

options.A: Zyadatar saplings ko full sun ya partial shade

questions.explanation: Zyadatar saplings ko healthy growth ke liye पर्याप्त sunlight ki zaroorat hoti hai, ya toh full sun ya partial shade, depending on species.

questions.question: Aphids jaise pests ko control karne ke liye kya natural method use kar sakte hain?

options.A: Ladybugs ka use karna (biological control)
options.C: Plants ko pani mein dubo dena

questions.explanation: Ladybugs aphids ke natural predators hote hain, unka use biological pest control ka ek effective tarika hai.

questions.question: Saplings mein micronutrient deficiency ke kya symptoms ho sakte hain?

options.A: Pattiyon ka peela padna (chlorosis) ya stunted growth

questions.explanation: Micronutrient deficiencies se plants mein chlorosis (iron, manganese deficiency), stunted growth aur anya vikas sambandhi samasyayein ho sakti hain.

questions.question: Saplings ko protect karne ke liye fencing kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Animals se bachane ke liye
options.B: Zyada dhoop se bachane ke liye
options.C: Zyada baarish se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Fencing saplings ko grazing animals aur anya wildlife se hone wale nuksan se bachati hai.

questions.question: Pruning ka kya uddeshya hai saplings mein?

options.A: Plant ki shape ko maintain karna aur unhealthy parts ko remove karna

questions.explanation: Pruning se plant ki shape maintain hoti hai, dead ya diseased branches ko remove kiya jata hai, aur overall plant health aur growth ko promote kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein diseases failane ka ek common source kya hai?

options.A: Unsterilized tools

questions.explanation: Unsterilized tools se diseases ek plant se doosre plant tak aasani se fail sakte hain.

questions.question: Saplings mein 'etiolation' kis karan hota hai?

options.A: Light ki kami ke karan lamba aur kamzor growth

questions.explanation: Etiolation ek phenomenon hai jismein plants light ki kami ke karan lambe, patle aur peele ho jate hain.

questions.question: Bio-pesticides ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Environmentally friendly aur target-specific

questions.explanation: Bio-pesticides natural substances se bane hote hain, jo environment ke liye kam harmful hote hain aur aksar specific pests ko target karte hain.

questions.question: Saplings ko transport karte samay kin baton ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Roots ko moist aur protected rakhna

questions.explanation: Transport ke dauran roots ko damage aur sukhne se bachana zaroori hai, isliye unhein moist aur protected rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Nursery mein pest aur disease monitoring kyon important hai?

options.A: Early detection aur timely action ke liye
options.C: Plants ko stress dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular monitoring se pests aur diseases ko shuruwat mein hi detect kiya ja sakta hai, jisse unhein control karna aasan ho jata hai aur bade nuksan se bacha ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Tree plantation ke liye pit digging ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Roots ko expand hone ke liye space dena

questions.explanation: Pit digging se roots ko mitti mein aasani se failne aur establish hone ke liye sufficient space milta hai.

questions.question: Ped lagate samay, root collar (jahan stem roots se milta hai) ko kahan hona chahiye?

options.A: Ground level par

questions.explanation: Root collar ko ground level par rakhna chahiye. Zyada gehra lagane se stem rot ho sakta hai, aur zyada upar lagane se roots expose ho sakti hain.

questions.question: Tree guard ka kya use hai naye lagaye hue pedon ke liye?

options.A: Animals aur physical damage se bachane ke liye
options.B: Zyada dhoop se bachane ke liye
options.D: Ped ko lamba karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Tree guards young trees ko grazing animals, mechanical damage aur vandalism se protect karte hain.

questions.question: Staking (ped ko sahara dena) kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Young pedon ko tez hawa se bachane aur seedha rakhne ke liye
options.C: Pattiyon ko support dene ke liye
options.D: Ped ko chhota rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Staking young pedon ko tez hawaon aur physical disturbances se bachata hai, jisse unki roots mitti mein achhe se establish ho sakein.

questions.question: Plantation ke baad initial watering kitni honi chahiye?

options.A: Achhe se gila karna, taki air pockets na rahein

questions.explanation: Plantation ke turant baad achhe se pani dena zaroori hai, jisse mitti roots ke around settle ho jaye aur koi air pockets na rahein.

questions.question: Container-grown trees ko lagate samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Roots ko gently loosen karna

questions.explanation: Container-grown trees mein aksar roots pot-bound ho jaati hain. Unhein lagane se pehle gently loosen karna chahiye, taki woh mitti mein fail sakein.

questions.question: Bare-root trees ko lagane ka sabse achha time kab hai?

options.A: Dormant season mein

questions.explanation: Bare-root trees ko dormant season mein lagana chahiye, jab unke paas energy store ho aur unhein transplant shock se recover hone ka time mile.

questions.question: Tree planting ke baad 'saucer' kyon banaya jata hai?

options.A: Pani ko roots tak pahunchane ke liye
options.B: Ped ko seedha rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Ped ke charon taraf ek chhota sa 'saucer' banaya jata hai, jisse pani jama ho aur dheere-dheere roots tak absorb ho.

questions.question: Tree plantation mein spacing kyon important hai?

options.A: Har ped ko proper light, water aur nutrients mil sakein
options.B: Sirf zyada ped lagane ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper spacing se har ped ko apni growth ke liye zaroori resources milte hain aur competition kam hota hai.

questions.question: Kis type ke ped roadsides par lagane ke liye suitable nahi hote?

options.A: Badi aur shallow roots wale ped

questions.explanation: Badi aur shallow roots wale ped roads aur pavements ko damage kar sakte hain, isliye unhein roadsides par lagana avoid kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Tree planting ke baad dead branches ko remove karna kyon important hai?

options.A: Disease spread rokne aur plant health improve karne ke liye
options.B: Ped ko chhota karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dead branches diseases ko attract kar sakti hain aur healthy growth ko rok sakti hain, isliye unhein remove karna chahiye.

questions.question: Plantation site preparation mein soil testing kyon important hai?

options.A: Soil pH aur nutrient content janne ke liye
options.B: Mitti ko gila karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Soil testing se mitti ki composition, pH aur nutrient deficiencies ka pata chalta hai, jisse sahi ped ka selection aur amendments kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Transplant shock ke symptoms kya hain?

options.A: Pattiyon ka murjhana, girna aur growth slow hona

questions.explanation: Transplant shock tab hota hai jab plant ko ek jagah se doosri jagah move kiya jata hai, jisse uski roots disturb hoti hain aur woh temporarily stress mein aa jata hai.

questions.question: Pits mein organic matter (jaise compost) kyon add karte hain?

options.A: Soil structure, fertility aur water retention improve karne ke liye
options.B: Mitti ko hard banane ke liye
options.D: Pani ka drainage kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Organic matter mitti ki quality ko kai tarah se sudharta hai, jisse roots ko achhi growth milti hai.

questions.question: Plantation ke baad roots ko drying se bachane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Mulching karna

questions.explanation: Mulching mitti ki nami ko banaye rakhta hai aur roots ko sukhne se bachata hai.

questions.question: Ek achhe tree planting project mein survival rate kitna target kiya jata hai?

options.A: Minimum 70-80%

questions.explanation: Ek successful tree planting project mein, proper care aur management ke saath, 70-80% ya usse zyada survival rate target kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Sustainable tree plantation ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Paryavaran ko nuksan pahunchaye bina ped lagana aur manage karna
options.B: Sirf tezi se badhne wale ped lagana
options.D: Sirf profit ke liye ped lagana

questions.explanation: Sustainable plantation mein long-term ecological balance aur resource conservation ka dhyan rakha jata hai.

questions.question: Tree plantation projects mein community participation kyon important hai?

options.A: Project ki success aur longevity ke liye
options.B: Sirf labor cost kam karne ke liye
options.C: Government funds attract karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Community participation se logon mein ownership ki feeling aati hai aur woh pedon ki dekhbhal mein active role nibhate hain, jisse project ki success rate badhti hai.

questions.question: Record keeping ka kya fayda hai nursery aur plantation management mein?

options.A: Decision making aur future planning ke liye data provide karna

questions.explanation: Accurate records se yeh pata chalta hai ki kaun se methods effective hain, kya problems aayi hain, aur kaise future projects ko improve kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Safety equipment jaise gloves aur safety shoes kyon zaroori hain?

options.A: Choton se bachne ke liye
options.C: Kaam ko slow karne ke liye
options.D: Zyada garmi se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: Safety equipment workers ko cuts, punctures aur anya physical injuries se bachate hain.

questions.question: Government schemes jaise 'Green India Mission' ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.A: India ke forest cover ko badhana aur climate change se ladna

questions.explanation: Green India Mission India ke climate change action plan ka ek hissa hai, jiska aim forest cover ko badhana aur ecosystem services ko restore karna hai.

questions.question: Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kisi project ke environment par hone wale asar ka evaluation
options.B: Sirf project ki cost estimate karna

questions.explanation: EIA ek process hai jo proposed project ke environmental consequences ko identify, predict, evaluate aur mitigate karta hai.

questions.question: Water conservation practices mein se kaun sa method nursery mein use kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Rainwater harvesting
options.B: Din mein tez dhoop mein pani dena

questions.explanation: Rainwater harvesting se baarish ke pani ko collect aur store kiya jata hai, jise baad mein plants ko pani dene ke liye use kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Hazardous waste ko kaise dispose karna chahiye nursery mein?

options.A: Properly label karke aur authorized disposal sites par

questions.explanation: Hazardous waste (jaise chemical containers) ko sahi tarike se dispose karna zaroori hai, taki environment aur health ko nuksan na ho.

questions.question: Nursery mein waste management ka kya principle hai?

options.A: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle

questions.explanation: Reduce (waste kam karna), Reuse (cheezon ko dobara use karna) aur Recycle (waste ko naye products mein convert karna) waste management ke core principles hain.

questions.question: Job-oriented skills mein 'teamwork' kyon important hai plantation projects mein?

options.A: Bade projects ko efficiently complete karne ke liye
options.D: Kaam ko dheere karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bade plantation projects mein kai log ek saath kaam karte hain, jahan teamwork se goals ko achieve karna aasan ho jata hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa act India mein forest conservation se related hai?

options.A: Forest (Conservation) Act, 1980
options.B: Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974
options.C: Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981

questions.explanation: Forest (Conservation) Act, 1980 India mein forests ke preservation aur diversion ko regulate karta hai.

questions.question: Nursery mein chemical fertilizers ka over-reliance kyon avoid karna chahiye?

options.A: Soil health ko nuksan pahuncha sakte hain aur water pollution kar sakte hain
options.D: Plants ko zyada healthy banate hain

questions.explanation: Chemical fertilizers ka zyada use mitti ki natural fertility ko kam kar sakta hai aur groundwater mein leech hokar water pollution bhi kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Organic farming practices mein soil fertility kaise maintain ki jaati hai?

options.A: Compost, green manure aur crop rotation se

questions.explanation: Organic farming mein soil health aur fertility ko natural methods jaise compost, green manure aur crop rotation se maintain kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Carbon footprint kam karne mein tree plantation ka kya role hai?

options.A: Atmospheric carbon dioxide ko absorb karke

questions.explanation: Ped carbon dioxide ko absorb karke carbon sequestration karte hain, jisse hamara carbon footprint kam hota hai.

questions.question: Certification for sustainable forestry (jaise FSC) ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Forest products ko responsibly managed sources se certify karna
options.B: Sirf illegal logging ko promote karna
options.D: Sirf profit ke liye forests use karna

questions.explanation: FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) jaise certifications yeh ensure karte hain ki forest products aise forests se aate hain jinka management environmental, social aur economic roop se responsible hai.

questions.question: Ek successful tree plantation project mein post-plantation care kitne samay tak zaroori hai?

options.A: Kam se kam 3-5 saal tak
options.C: Sirf jab tak ped chhota ho

questions.explanation: Ped lagane ke baad kam se kam 3-5 saal tak regular care (watering, weeding, protection) zaroori hai, taki woh achhe se establish ho sakein.
